name: robot-control-stack
description: A lean, ROS-free sim-to-real framework for training and deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and RL agents. Native MuJoCo Gymnasium wrappers with synchronous execution for Franka, UR5e, xArm, and SO101.
summaryZh: A lean, ROS-free sim-to-real framework for training and deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and RL agents. Native MuJoCo Gymnasium wrappers with synchronous execution for Franka, UR5e, xArm, and SO101. 这是一类偏执行和编排的 AI 项目，适合拿来搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
